title: LumberSmith
description: {Forge} This will bring you some more "Log" based blocks for more decoration and a new way to store hidden valuables! Overall, a Log Overhaul!
body:
{Forge} LumberSmith 1.18.2 | 1.19.2 | 1.19.4 | 1.20.1

(NEW) 2.0 Package has Nether Stem Types

Hello! Here's a few new Wooden Log based blocks for future
construction and a way to store your valuables!

This adds (Wood-Type) Log Stairs, (Wood-Type) Log Walls, (Wood-Type) Log Slabs
as well as a new storage block named (Wood-Type) Hollowed (3 Slots to hide your materials!)

- Do not upload this to any other mod website without permission of the Author (JTMessenger) However feel free to use it in any Modpack or Server! Join the Discord for any questions about this mod or be updated with the latest!

Socials
Socials https://linktr.ee/jtmessenger
(Feel Free to join the Discord for any support, bug reporting, or just to socialize!)

-=-
